identity.styleSentence: An emotive anthem blending gritty distorted electric guitars with polished trap percussion and deep 808s at an 112 BPM (half-time feel), featuring a bilingual male vocalist who transitions from vulnerable melodic rap to explosive stadium-ready singing.
identity.summary: A cathartic anthem about transitioning from relying on a toxic 'fire' in another person to finding internal resilience and self-sufficiency through raw acceptance of one's own pain.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Close-up of a raw human hand with visible cracks in the skin, warm blood seeping onto cold concrete floor, cinematic lighting highlighting the texture of pain.

keywords.emotion: Transformative energy shifting from external dependency to internal source
keywords.imageryPrompt: A golden matchstick striking against a dark stormy night sky, illuminating a single tear track on a cheek, the flame reflecting in wet pavement.

keywords.emotion: Safe haven and acceptance rather than fear
keywords.imageryPrompt: A cozy room filled with thick velvet shadows where dust motes dance peacefully in moonlight, no sources of danger but a sense of restful enclosure.

keywords.emotion: Solitude redefined as strength rather than loneliness
keywords.imageryPrompt: A solitary figure standing on an open cliff edge watching the sunrise, back to camera, wearing oversized hoodie, posture relaxed and confident despite isolation.

keywords.emotion: Tools of destruction turned into tools for creation
keywords.imageryPrompt: A scattered pile of wooden matches lying on a scratched metal surface next to an unlit candle, rain dripping slowly onto the wood grain.

keywords.emotion: The absence of noise as a new form of peace and clarity
keywords.imageryPrompt: A still life composition featuring a glass vase with dried flowers reflecting nothingness, soft diffused light filtering through blinds creating calm horizontal lines.

keywords.emotion: The painful process required for rebirth and awareness
keywords.imageryPrompt: Ember-like particles floating upwards in slow motion against a black void, each ember glowing with an inner blue-white light representing transformation.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Vulnerable, trembling isolation with raw rain ambience

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Anxious desperation and the struggle between wanting to call vs. knowing better

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Explosive release of pain transforming into a defiant declaration of self-illumination

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Intimate realization and the quiet acceptance that silence is no longer scary

sections.name: Drop
sections.emotion: Triumphant self-empowerment with polished sheen over gritty emotion

sections.name: Outro
sections.emotion: Peaceful resolution and the gentle warmth of a candle lit by oneself
